day4_night_start.name: 私
day4_night_start.text: *家に帰ってきた。ドアに鍵をかけた。カーテンを閉めた。*

day4_night_start_2.name: 私
day4_night_start_2.text: *明日で5日目。ソルファが言った期限。……5日が過ぎたらどうなるんだ？*

day4_night_phone.name: 私
day4_night_phone.text:
*セア：『{name}、明日も一緒に行こう！ 約束だよ？』*
*セア：『約束だよ。』*
*セア：『約束だよ。』*

day4_night_phone_2.name: 私
day4_night_phone_2.text: *ウンス先生：『明日ちょっと早く来てくれる？ 話したいことがあるの。』*

day4_night_phone_3.name: 私
day4_night_phone_3.text: *……電源を切りたい。でも切ったらもっと疑われそうだ。*

day4_night_phone_7.name: 私
day4_night_phone_7.text: *...The same message repeating. The timestamps are getting shorter and shorter.*

day4_night_phone_8.name: 私
day4_night_phone_8.text: *Sea: 'I'll wait at the school gate tomorrow morning'*

day4_night_phone_9.name: 私
day4_night_phone_9.text: *Sea: 'You have to come' Sea: 'You have to'*

day4_night_phone_10.name: 私
day4_night_phone_10.text: *...I left them unread. Flipped the phone face-down. It keeps vibrating. Tap. Tap. Tap.*

day4_night_phone_11.name: 私
day4_night_phone_11.text: *A message from Ms. Eunsu too. Ms. Eunsu: 'Could you come in a little early tomorrow? I have something I want to talk about.'*

day4_night_phone_12.name: 私
day4_night_phone_12.text: *Ms. Eunsu: 'There's something I want to say to you, {name}. It's important.' ...Something important. What? About the 'Final Processing'? I put the phone in a drawer. The vibrations drone on from inside.*

day4_night_plan.name: 私
day4_night_plan.text: *整理しよう。この学校は転校生を対象に実験を行っている。*

day4_night_plan_2.name: 私
day4_night_plan_2.text: *ウンス先生は転校生を『管理』し、リインは薬物を投与し、セアは……監視？ それともそれ以上？*

day4_night_plan_4.name: 私
day4_night_plan_4.text: *Two. Ms. Eunsu oversees it all. Selecting transfer students, managing them, deciding on Final Processing.*

day4_night_plan_5.name: 私
day4_night_plan_5.text: *Three. Riin handles the drugs. Memory manipulation drugs. Sedatives. Injections.*

day4_night_plan_6.name: 私
day4_night_plan_6.text: *Four. Sea is a watcher. She approaches transfer students and reports on their behavior. But... Sea herself is also trapped in this school.*

day4_night_plan_7.name: 私
day4_night_plan_7.text: *Five. Yuna is an internal resister. She was collecting evidence. She was discovered and imprisoned in the basement.*

day4_night_plan_8.name: 私
day4_night_plan_8.text: *Six. Seolhwa was Subject #7, one year ago. She resisted the experiment and was 'processed.' She became a ghost.*

day4_night_plan_9.name: 私
day4_night_plan_9.text: *Seven. I am Subject #13. Day 5 is the end. Tomorrow.*

day4_night_plan_10.name: 私
day4_night_plan_10.text: *I put down the pen. My hands are trembling and the letters are all crooked.*

day4_night_plan_11.name: 私
day4_night_plan_11.text: *...Tomorrow. Tomorrow is Day 5. The 'last day' Seolhwa warned me about.*

day4_night_plan_choice.name: 私
choices: 証拠を外部に公開する
彼女たちと直接対峙する

day4_night_plan_escape.name: 私
day4_night_plan_escape.text: *明日、隙を見て学校の外へ逃げ出す。ユナも連れて行かなければ。*

day4_night_plan_escape_2.name: 私
day4_night_plan_escape_2.text: *The front gate is out. I'm being watched. The safety app — GPS tracking. The school gate — Ms. Eunsu is guarding it. The old building emergency exit? Yuna might know something. If I saved Yuna... we could leave together.*

day4_night_plan_escape_3.name: 私
day4_night_plan_escape_3.text: *I've saved the evidence on my phone. Once I'm outside, I'll go straight to the police.*

day4_night_plan_expose.name: 私
day4_night_plan_expose.text: *証拠をインターネットにアップする。警察に通報する。この学校の真実を世間に知らせる。*

day4_night_plan_expose_2.name: 私
day4_night_plan_expose_2.text: *The problem is communication. The school wifi is probably being monitored. Data... the safety app might be monitoring that too. I'd have to go outside and use a public wifi hotspot... or put it on a USB and hand it to someone.*

day4_night_plan_confront.name: 私
day4_night_plan_confront.text: *ウンス先生、リイン、セア……直接会って真実を問いただす。なぜこんなことをしているのか。*

day4_night_plan_confront_2.name: 私
day4_night_plan_confront_2.text: *...I know it's reckless. But Sea, Riin, maybe even Ms. Eunsu herself... isn't it possible they want to escape this situation too? Or maybe that's just wishful thinking.*

day4_night_sleep.name: 私
day4_night_sleep.text: *...I've made my plan. I don't know if it's the right one. But doing nothing means ending up like Seolhwa.*

day4_night_sleep_2.name: 私
day4_night_sleep_2.text: *I turned off the light and lay down. There's no way I'll fall asleep. I stare at the ceiling. The clock ticks.*

day4_night_sleep_3.name: 私
day4_night_sleep_3.text: *...I don't know when I fell asleep.*

day4_night_seolhwa.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa.text: *眠りに落ちる。…いや、眠ったのかどうかもわからない。目を開けると学校だ。でも何かがおかしい。すべてが少しずれている。色が褪せていて、時計が逆に回っている。*

day4_night_seolhwa_2.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_2.text: *…私が廊下を歩いている。いや、私じゃない。この体は…雪花の記憶だ。*

day4_night_seolhwa_3.name: 保健教師
day4_night_seolhwa_3.text:
「はい、力抜いて。すぐ終わるから。」
*…同じ笑顔。同じ言い方。1年前も同じだったんだ。*

day4_night_seolhwa_4.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_4.text: *職員室。ウンスが書類を整理している。タイトルが見える。「被験者#7 ─ 最終報告書」。*

day4_night_seolhwa_5.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_5.text: *「記憶再構成プロトコル…██失敗██…逆効果発生。被験者が██すべての記憶██を保持…隔離不可と判断…5日目23:00最終処理執行…」*

day4_night_seolhwa_6.name: 担任教師
day4_night_seolhwa_6.text: 「ごめんね、雪花。…先生もどうしようもなかったんだ。」

day4_night_seolhwa_9.name: イ・ソルファ
day4_night_seolhwa_9.text: 「明日の夜だよ。…ユナを守って。」

day4_night_seolhwa_10.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_10.text: *雪花の姿がノイズのように散っていく。*

day4_night_seolhwa_11.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_11.text: *…目が覚めた。冷や汗びっしょりだ。…夢じゃなかった。いや、夢だったけど──本物だった。*

day4_night_seolhwa_12.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_12.text: *The same smile. The same tone. ...A script unchanged after a year. The needle goes in. Cold liquid spreads through the veins. Vision blurs. The scene shifts.*

day4_night_seolhwa_13.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_13.text: *The faculty office. Eunsu is sorting documents. Seolhwa — I — am standing at the door. Watching in secret. I can see the document title. 'Subject #7 — Final Report'*

day4_night_seolhwa_14.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_14.text: *The text is readable. The words are blurry. Because of the drugs. But they embed themselves in my mind.*

day4_night_seolhwa_15.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_15.text: *"Memory Reconstruction Protocol ver.3.8... Subject #7 Lee Seolhwa..."*

day4_night_seolhwa_17.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_17.text: *"Adverse effect observed. Subject retained ██all memories██ instead... Drug resistance confirmed..."*

day4_night_seolhwa_18.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_18.text: *"Containment deemed impossible... **Day 5, 23:00: Final Processing Executed**..." ...Final Processing. Seolhwa's body knows what that means. Terror floods in. Seolhwa's terror becomes mine. The scene shifts again.*

day4_night_seolhwa_19.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_19.text: *The basement. Fluorescent lights flicker. Bound to a chair. Leather straps cutting into the wrists. Eunsu is standing there. Her expression... is the same as now. Tired and complicated.*

day4_night_seolhwa_22.name: パク・ウンス
day4_night_seolhwa_22.text: "...I'll make sure it doesn't hurt. Once it's over, you'll feel at peace."

day4_night_seolhwa_23.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_23.text: *From behind Eunsu, Riin approaches holding a syringe.*

day4_night_seolhwa_24.name: パク・ウンス
day4_night_seolhwa_24.text: "It'll be quick. Just keep your eyes closed. ...Trust your teacher."

day4_night_seolhwa_25.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_25.text: *Seolhwa — I — screamed. But no voice comes out. The syringe touches the arm. Cold. The liquid enters. Vision goes white. White. White. ...And then darkness.*

day4_night_seolhwa_26.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_26.text: *...Light seeps through the darkness. Seolhwa is standing there. An expression I've never seen before. Sad, but... resolute eyes. Eyes that have made up their mind. Transparent hands clenched into fists. Light shines through between the fingers.*

day4_night_seolhwa_29.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_29.text: *Seolhwa's voice is clear. We're inside a dream, but... it's a real voice.*

day4_night_seolhwa_30.name: イ・ソルファ
day4_night_seolhwa_30.text: "Day 5, 11 PM at night. That's when they do the 'Final Processing.'"

day4_night_seolhwa_31.name: イ・ソルファ
day4_night_seolhwa_31.text: "It happened to me too. On the fifth night... it ended."

day4_night_seolhwa_33.name: イ・ソルファ
day4_night_seolhwa_33.text: "**Tomorrow night.** That's the time you have left, {name}."

day4_night_seolhwa_34.name: イ・ソルファ
day4_night_seolhwa_34.text: "...Protect Yuna. Yuna... can't end up like me."

day4_night_seolhwa_35.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_35.text: *Seolhwa's lips tremble. She's holding back tears.*

day4_night_seolhwa_37.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_37.text: *Seolhwa tries to take my hand. Her transparent hand passes through mine. It doesn't hold.*

day4_night_seolhwa_38.name: イ・ソルファ
day4_night_seolhwa_38.text: "Old building, 3rd floor. The emergency exit. ...It's the route I found."

day4_night_seolhwa_39.name: イ・ソルファ
day4_night_seolhwa_39.text: "I wasn't able to get out through that route... but you can, {name}."

day4_night_seolhwa_40.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_40.text: *Seolhwa's form begins to scatter like static noise from the edges.*

day4_night_seolhwa_42.name: 私
day4_night_seolhwa_42.text: *Seolhwa smiled. A final smile. Without tears, resolute. The light scatters. Seolhwa scatters. The dream scatters.*

day4_night_wake.name: 私
day4_night_wake.text: *Eyes open. Drenched in cold sweat. The blanket is soaked.*

day4_night_wake_2.name: 私
day4_night_wake_2.text: *The clock. 3:41 AM. My heart feels like it's shot up to my throat.*

day4_night_wake_3.name: 私
day4_night_wake_3.text: *It was a dream. But... it wasn't a dream. I felt Seolhwa's terror directly. The coldness of the syringe. The tightening of the leather straps. The meaning of 'Final Processing.'*

day4_night_wake_4.name: 私
day4_night_wake_4.text: ***Tomorrow night, 11 PM. I have to get out of this school before then.***

day4_night_wake_5.name: 私
day4_night_wake_5.text: *Old building, 3rd floor emergency exit. The route Seolhwa found.*

day4_night_wake_6.name: 私
day4_night_wake_6.text: *...I packed my bag. Evidence. Phone. Charger. The bare minimum. ...Tomorrow. The last day.*
